## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Shaped and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and review progress on various content pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on top-of-funnel (TOFU) glossary-style content for traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Need for technical accuracy and matter-of-fact tone in content](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Importance of up-to-date information due to rapidly evolving tech landscape](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Plan to scale content production while maintaining quality and alignment with Shaped's goals](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Focus

  - [Emphasis on TOFU glossary-type content for traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Mix of content types: glossary, blog posts, case studies, and some middle-of-funnel (MOFU) pieces](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose content mix options (e.g., 75% glossary/TOFU, 50-50 mix) with traffic potential estimates](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Tully from Shaped has capacity to review content thoroughly](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Need for matter-of-fact, technical tone without excessive verbosity](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Request to include targeted keywords (primary and secondary) at the top of each article for context during review](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)

### Technical Accuracy and Feedback

  - [Importance of distinguishing between related concepts (e.g., vector search vs. recommendations)](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Shaped to provide detailed feedback on technical accuracy and product-specific nuances](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate feedback into future content and refine their understanding of Shaped's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Goal to ramp up content production and start publishing soon](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Plan to force index with Google and monitor impressions to test effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Introduction of new writer Tiondra to the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Jakub taking on more leadership in client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send proposed content topics for the next few weeks by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Shaped to review and provide feedback on existing content drafts](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate feedback and refine content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Begin scaling content production and prepare for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Continue weekly syncs to align on progress and address any issues](https://fathom.video/share/f6fyvNRtdKZAGeiopYU-jneGpF9aM-Az?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
